svg.title: Sub-G: Linkage Rod Guide Slots — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Two Identical Rectangular Through-Slots in Side Walls — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Slots are subtractive cuts in Sub-A tray walls

g.text: DETAIL A — Left Slot, Front View
DETAIL B — Left Slot, Side View
1. Two identical slots, mirrored about CL at X=80 mm.
2. Slots are subtractive cuts (no separate part).
3. Rod shown in blue dashed for reference only.
4. Ghost outline in Detail B shows rod at full
6. Print orientation: slots bridge 5.0 mm in Z
across wall thickness (well within FDM limits).
Y extent: 17.0 to 23.0 mm (6.0 mm length)
Z extent: 35.0 to 40.0 mm (5.0 mm width)
X extent: through full wall (5.0 mm)
Rod clearance (Y): 0.25 mm per end at full travel
